scripts.build:bun: bun build src/app.jsx --outfile dist/bundle.js --minify --target browser && bunx tailwindcss -i src/input.css -o dist/style.css --minify
scripts.watch:bun: bun build src/app.jsx --outfile dist/bundle.js --target browser --watch & bunx tailwindcss -i src/input.css -o dist/style.css --watch
